column6: Provide Personal Interview experience. List out the questions asked in personal interaction round.
column7: Provide the list of technical questions asked during the interview (technical subject related)

column6:
I had 2 rounds of interview, First interview was technical, second interview was technical + HR with the MD.
 The first interview was quite longer compared to the second.
 I applied for the UI/UX job role. So most of the questions were about the UI/UX, and the questions were mainly towards how I would fit into their workflow.
 Questions were asked on projects, and some situational questions according to projects too, for my job role they’ve mentioned Figma as a requirement so they tested how much Figma I know and also the frontend technologies.
column7: The questions were related to React.js as I used it for one of my projects. I’ve made a project on DSP processing, hence I had few questions on that topics too.
